userStories.title: judge tests 基础设施 + 7 judge file mock 拆除 batch 1(D-265 foundation · RCA-007 拆分)
userStories.description: As Coding 3.0 项目 · I want tests/setup.ts + .env.example + vitest.judge.config.ts 基础设施就位 + 7 judge file batch 1(analysis-structural/analysis-viral/branding/copywriting/copywriting-acquisition/copywriting-boom/copywriting-free)移除 vi.mock('@/workers/llm-gateway') + 加 describe.skipIf(!process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) · so that 后续 US-002/003 7 file × 2 batch 可继承模板 · TD-027 真闭环模板建立
acceptanceCriteria: AC-1: tests/setup.ts 新建 · 含 `import * as dotenv from 'dotenv'; dotenv.config();` 或等价 ESM import · 验证 head tests/setup.ts 含 dotenv
AC-2: .env.example 加 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY= 行(带注释 '# PRD-28 LLM Judge real-call mode')· 验证 grep 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' .env.example 命中
AC-3: vitest.judge.config.ts setupFiles 含 'tests/setup.ts' · 验证 grep 'setupFiles' vitest.judge.config.ts 含 setup.ts

AC-4: 7 judge file batch 1 全部移除 `vi.mock('@/workers/llm-gateway', () => (...))` + mockComplete/mockResolvedValue 等 mock 助手 · 验证 grep -rn 'vi.mock.*llm-gateway' tests/judge/{analysis-structural,analysis-viral,branding,copywriting,copywriting-acquisition,copywriting-boom,copywriting-free}.judge.ts 命中 0
AC-5: 7 judge file batch 1 全部在 describe 最外层加 `describe.skipIf(!process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)('XYZ LLM Judge', () => {...})` · 验证 grep -c 'describe.skipIf.*ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' 在 7 file 各 ≥ 1
AC-6: 无 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env 下跑 pnpm test:judge tests/judge/branding.judge.ts smoke · 输出 'skipped' · 0 hard fail
AC-7: ROOT scope cd /Users/return/Desktop/QuanAn && pnpm test 维持 baseline 1925 passed | 118 skipped(±10 容忍) · 零回归
AC-8: pnpm typecheck 6 ws 全 Done · 0 error
AC-9: pnpm lint --max-warnings=0 0 warning
AC-COMMON: ROOT scope vitest 必跑(M-2 教训)· typecheck + tests pass + lint 0 errors
userStories.test_command: cd /Users/return/Desktop/QuanAn && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test 2>&1 | tail -10

anti_patterns.lesson: PRD-25 US-008 只改 voice-chat.judge.ts 一个文件 · 用 vi.hoisted+beforeEach 仍是 mock pass:true 固定值 · 21 file 假闭环 · 必须完全删 vi.mock · 不允许 vi.hoisted controlled mock 模式
anti_patterns.antipattern: const { mockComplete } = vi.hoisted(() => ({ mockComplete: vi.fn() })); vi.mock('@/workers/llm-gateway', () => ({ llmGateway: { complete: mockComplete } }));  beforeEach(() => mockComplete.mockResolvedValue({content:{pass:true,score:8}}));  // 反例: 仍是 mock
anti_patterns.correct: describe.skipIf(!process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)('XYZ LLM Judge', () => { it('真调测试', async () => { const result = await runJudge(case_); /* runJudge 内部走 llmGateway.complete 真调 */ }); });  // 完全删 vi.mock

AC-2: tests/fixtures/judge-goldens/custom-70.json 存在 · valid JSON array · length=70 · 验证 jq 'length' = 70

AC-3: 100 条 entry 全部符合 GoldenSample zod schema · {id: regex /^(sally|custom)-\d{3}$/, specialistId: enum 14 个, mode?, input, expectedOutputPattern?, criteria: array.min(2), expectedKeyFields: array.min(1), source: enum sally|custom, tags?}
AC-4: 14 specialist 配额验证(custom-70.json)· CopywritingAgent ≥ 12 · BrandingAgent ≥ 10 · TopicAgent ≥ 8 · MonetizationAgent + PositioningAgent + VideoAgent + AnalysisAgent 按表 · 总 70
AC-5: sally-30.json 来源真实 · 含 source='sally' 标记 · 每条 input 是 sally step3/3b/4b/5/7 实测样本(从 /tmp/aiipznt-clone-research/api/* 抓)
AC-6: packages/schemas/src/judge-golden.schema.ts 导出 GoldenSample + GoldenDataset zod schema + z.infer 类型
AC-7: tests/fixtures/judge-goldens/SCHEMA.md ≥ 50 行 · 含 GoldenSample TypeScript interface + 2 JSON example(1 sally + 1 custom)
AC-8: tests/fixtures/judge-goldens/__tests__/dataset-validation.test.ts ≥ 4 tests · schema 验证 / count 验证 / specialistId 合法 / source 标记 · pnpm test 全 pass

AC-10: ROOT scope cd /Users/return/Desktop/QuanAn && pnpm test 维持 baseline · 零回归

userStories.title: evaluation pipeline · prisma schema + eval-run.ts CLI + 4 维度评分(D-267 + D-268 字面锁 · high)
userStories.description: As ops/admin · I want pnpm --filter @quanan/api eval:run CLI 命令跑 100 sample 真调 specialist · 写库 + 4 维度评分(结构 zod + 内容 LLM Judge + duration + cost) · so that evaluation_runs + evaluation_samples 表持久化每次跑批结果 · 为 admin UI + inter-rater + /goal-verify 提供数据基础
acceptanceCriteria: AC-1: prisma/schema.prisma 加 EvaluationRun model · 字段: id Int @id @default(autoincrement()) · runId String @unique @db.VarChar(36)(UUID) · startedAt DateTime · finishedAt? · totalSamples/passedSamples/failedSamples/skippedSamples Int · avgScore Decimal? @db.Decimal(3,2) · modelTier String · model String · totalTokens Int · totalCostUsd Decimal @db.Decimal(8,4) · status String('running'/'completed'/'failed') · metadata Json? · @@index([startedAt(sort: Desc)]) @@map('evaluation_runs')

AC-2: prisma/schema.prisma 加 EvaluationSample model · 字段: id · runId @db.VarChar(36) FK · goldenId String @db.VarChar(20) · specialistId/mode · input/actualOutput Json · judgeScore Int @db.SmallInt · judgePass Boolean · judgeReason @db.Text · structurePass Boolean · durationMs/tokensUsed Int · costUsd @db.Decimal(8,6) · humanScore/humanScoreBy/humanScoredAt(US-007 写)· @@index([runId][specialistId][createdAt desc])
AC-3: prisma migration · pnpm prisma migrate dev --name add_evaluation_tables 成功 · psql '\dt evaluation_*' 命中 2 表
AC-4: evaluation_runs + evaluation_samples 表 **RLS DISABLE**(LD-A-1 系统级)· 验证 psql 'SELECT relrowsecurity FROM pg_class WHERE relname IN (...)' 全 false · **不引入 accountId 字段**
AC-5: pnpm --filter @quanan/api eval:run --samples=5 smoke · 无 KEY 提示 exit 1 · 有 KEY 写 1 run + 5 sample · psql count = 5
AC-6: --specialist=PositioningAgent --samples=10 跑 10 个 · evaluation_samples.specialist_id 全 PositioningAgent
AC-7: --source=sally 仅跑 sally-30 · evaluation_samples.goldenId 全 'sally-*'
AC-8: evaluator.ts runSampleEvaluation 返 {structurePass(zod.safeParse), judgeScore(runJudge), judgePass(score>=6), durationMs, tokensUsed, costUsd} · evaluator.test.ts ≥ 4 case
AC-9: eval-run.ts 错误处理 · 缺 KEY exit 1 · 单 sample fail 写 judgePass=false 不阻塞 · 全 fail status='failed'
AC-10: eval-run.test.ts ≥ 6 tests · CLI 参数/dataset 加载/写库/错误处理 · 全 pass
AC-11: pnpm typecheck 6 ws 全 Done · 0 error · pnpm lint 0 warning
AC-12: ROOT scope cd /Users/return/Desktop/QuanAn && pnpm test baseline 维持(±10 · 加新 test 增加 passed count)· 零回归
AC-COMMON: ROOT scope vitest 必跑(M-2 教训)· prisma migration 必先 apply 再跑 integration test
userStories.test_command: cd /Users/return/Desktop/QuanAn && pnpm prisma migrate dev --name add_evaluation_tables && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test 2>&1 | tail -10

anti_patterns.source_story: REJ-008 + REJ-009 数据隔离 + RLS
anti_patterns.lesson: evaluation_runs/samples 是**系统级**表 · 跟 admin 一样 RLS DISABLE · 但**不挂 accountId 字段**(LD-A-1)· CLI eval-run.ts 走 prisma 直连(无 RLS ctx)· 不能假设有 trpc ctx · 不能用 ctx.activeAccountId
anti_patterns.antipattern: model EvaluationRun { ... accountId Int  // 反例: 加 accountId }
anti_patterns.correct: model EvaluationRun { ...  // 无 accountId · 系统级 · RLS DISABLE }

anti_patterns.lesson: eval-run.ts 跑真 LLM 必须走 LLMGateway 抽象层 · 不允许 CLI 内 import @anthropic-ai/sdk 直接调 · evaluator.ts 调 specialist.execute 链路保持
anti_patterns.antipattern: import Anthropic from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'; ... await anthropic.messages.create({...})  // 反例: 绕 Gateway
anti_patterns.correct: const agent = new PositioningAgent(); await agent.execute({...});  // specialist.execute → BaseSpecialist.invokeLLM → llmGateway.complete

AC-5: admin layout nav 加 'Evaluation' entry · href='/evaluation' · icon='chart-bar' · role ops|admin 可见
AC-6: 3 路由 lazy load · React.lazy + webpackChunkName='admin-evaluation' · 继承 PRD-26 模式

AC-9: 使用 agent-browser 打开 http://localhost:5173/admin/evaluation · 验证 evaluation 表显示 + 矩阵渲染 + 无 console error
AC-10: pnpm typecheck 6 ws 全 Done · pnpm lint 0 warning · ROOT scope pnpm test baseline 维持

userStories.title: inter-rater agreement subset(30 sample · seeded by runId hash · Cohen's kappa + Pearson · D-270 字面锁)
userStories.description: As ops/admin · I want /admin/evaluation/inter-rater/:runId 页面手工评 0-10 分 30 sample(seeded by runId hash) · 提交后自动计算 Cohen's kappa + Pearson · so that 评估 LLM Judge 评分 vs 人工评分一致性 · 阈值 kappa ≥ 0.4 moderate
acceptanceCriteria: AC-1: InterRaterPage 显示 30 sample(seeded random by runId hash · reproducible)· 每 sample 卡片含 input/actualOutput(JSON pretty)/criteria/LLM judge score & reason/0-10 slider + 注释 textarea
AC-2: 用户提交单 sample · trpc admin.evaluation.submitHumanScore({sampleId, humanScore, humanComment?}) · 写 EvaluationSample.humanScore + humanScoreBy + humanScoredAt
AC-3: 30 sample 全评完后自动计算 Cohen's kappa(分类型 LLM score 0-5/6-10 vs human 同分)+ Pearson correlation(连续 0-10 vs 0-10)· trpc admin.evaluation.computeAgreement 返 {kappa, pearson, interpretation}
AC-4: inter-rater.ts Cohen's kappa 实现 κ = (Po - Pe) / (1 - Pe) · 单元测试覆盖: 全一致κ=1 / 随机κ≈0 / 反向κ<0 · inter-rater.test.ts ≥ 4 case
AC-5: 30 sample subset 选择 · seeded random by runId hash · mulberry32 PRNG 或 Math.sin · 同 runId 永远取同 30 · listInterRaterSubset 调 2 次返同 ids
AC-6: admin /admin/evaluation/:runId 详情页加 'Inter-rater agreement' 子区域 · 显示 kappa + pearson + interpretation · 进度未完显示 'X/30 评完'
AC-7: /admin/evaluation/inter-rater/:runId 路由 + nav 不显示(仅 click-through)
AC-8: 使用 agent-browser 打开 inter-rater 页面 · 评 5 sample · 验证 progress 5/30 + 提交跳下一 sample + 无 console error
AC-9: pnpm typecheck 6 ws 全 Done · pnpm lint 0 warning · ROOT scope pnpm test 维持 baseline
AC-COMMON: ROOT scope vitest 必跑(M-2 教训) · admin/app 严格隔离(LD-A-1)
